hotel_name: Renaissance New York Times Square Hotel

reviews.title: If it's for 2 or 3 nights, I recommend it.
reviews.text:
Before staying here, I spent 5 nights at another hotel, where I could relax quietly along Central Park both in the morning and evening. The location in front of Times Square is good, but it gets noisy at night, and the solicitors in front of the hotel entrance are a nuisance.

Also, it seems there is a bar lounge in the hotel that overlooks Times Square, but I couldn't access it as it was under construction. I was disappointed because there was no mention of the construction on the hotel’s website or Agoda.

reviews.title: So far, my credit card has not yet been credited. I had paid $400 as a guarantee. I've been out since yesterday, and
reviews.positives: So far, my credit card has not yet been credited. I had paid $400 as a guarantee. I've been out since yesterday, and I was told that my money would be refunded. However, I still haven't received it.
reviews.negatives: So far, my credit card has not yet been credited. I had paid $400 as a guarantee. I've been out since yesterday, and I was told that my money would be refunded. However, I still haven't received it.

reviews.title: Hair in the bath.
reviews.text: I stayed there recently because of the good reviews. The location was nice, but the bathtub was not properly cleaned. There was hair in the bathtub as well as on the faucet. It was disappointing considering the expensive price.

reviews.title: Very bad and it was a bad choice of choosing Renaissance
reviews.negatives: Super very bad hospitality from the front desk employee

reviews.title: Great location, disappointing ROI
reviews.text: The rooms are decorated in quite old fashion and the noise proof is quite bad. This price is only for the location, not the quality of the hotel.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Never again…
reviews.positives: The property had a great location
reviews.negatives: Everything about the property was a terrible experience from the moment I stepped into the lobby. The only nice people were baggage. The staff was nasty because they can’t seem to be on one accord with their booking.com contracts and policies (this is my SECOND incident with renaissance) Management has very condescending (can’t do) attitude. (I missed my 8:30 show due to this and got no reimbursement) Lock on my door was broke, the room had gnats (no food in the room) cost was VERY HIGH, name on the tv wrong, no one at front desk at check out, valet took 40 minutes to get my car at check out because the person was somewhere sleeping. Just very messed up when you drove in for 8 hours and expected to have a great experience for vacation.

reviews.title: The location is really good.
reviews.text: The location is really good. The gallery wasn't bad either. One of the front desk staff was a bit unpleasant, but the rest of the staff were quite friendly.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Take cash USD in arrival and did not returned it back till now
reviews.positives: They took the USD 500 refundable and did not returned it back to me until now
reviews.negatives: Getting USD cash and did not returned it back

reviews.title: Book direct rather than 3rd party
reviews.text:
Agora overcharged room rates. Next time I will book direct with the hotel.

Good location. Easy access to subway.

reviews.title: Managers were rude to guest and failed to address the elevator safety concerns in a timely manner
reviews.negatives: The hotel had several life safety issues with the elevators.  My family suffered injuries with the elevator entrapment incident during our stay.  This hotel has a history of neglect and failure to maintain safe elevators.

reviews.title: Cozy hotel in an excellent location
reviews.text:
This hotel is in the heart of NYC with some of the rooms having a direct view of the Times. The room was decently sized and had a few amenities such as a coffee maker and minibar. 

It was worth it for us since we were only there for a day and the central location helped us explore a lot more of Manhattan.

However, it is insanely overpriced and absolutely not recommended unless you specific want this experience.

Few points to note, however.
- There are a few reviews that note that the breakfast experience was bad. We had an early check out, so we didn’t see if that still holds true. The R Lounge seemed quite cramped for space though, so I wouldn’t be surprised if the breakfast issues are still there.
- There are a few negative reviews about the staff at the front desk. Our experience was nothing but pleasant. We were given a card with information about what the 35 dollar destination fee includes exactly at check-in.
- The hotel has valet parking but we were unable to find the price online beforehand. FYI, it costed us 80 dollars plus 14 dollars tax for a total of $94. Self parking the car in the same SP+ lot would have cost us only $65.

It is a good hotel if it suits your specific requirements. However, if you are looking for any hotel to book in the heart of the city, this may not be the best option.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The room was dark and old. The bed sheets are uncomfortable, not soft. Two elevators don't work, and we can hear the people in the next room. The TV doesn't work either

reviews.title: Good stay

reviews.title: You wrote free parking lol. Then charged it off the company card onto my debit. Word of mouth is everything goodluck

reviews.title: Location
reviews.text: It was convenient right next to Times Square. There was a little noise at night, but it was not enough to be a problem.

reviews.title: I stayed 1 day for my 4 night stay
reviews.positives: The bathroom had mold on the ceiling
reviews.negatives: It was old and dirtyyyy

reviews.title: Nice location
reviews.text: Really nice place if you go to NY with your family. There are so many famous places around the hotel, you can walk to any place. Hotel location is the best!
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I was overcharged for my stay.

reviews.title: The location is really good.
reviews.text: It's my first trip to New York, and the location of the accommodation is great. Being in the center of Times Square makes it easy to move around, and there are plenty of restaurants, cafes, and shopping malls, which made it enjoyable. The staff was also friendly, so I was satisfied. However, the slow drainage of the sink and bathtub, and the fixed showerhead were inconvenient.

reviews.title: Bad room, bad hotel, great location.
reviews.negatives: The elevator service was down. We had to climb up the stairs to get to our room. The room was not the cleanest. Decor was shabby and did not match. The lobby, elevators, hallway were stinking. A serious let down.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: Excellent location as it is in the heart of Times Square. Very clean room and good customer service.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.negatives: The location was too busy, the hotel had no amenities for the price, it looked old and needed updated.

reviews.title: Best location.
reviews.text: Few steps away from the activities at Times Square. Good for first time traveler in NYC. hotel room size and bathroom  are relatively big or well laid out. Omar from the Navigator (hotel guides) is the best as he is friendly and accommodating with our questions.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Mold and dusty. Staff are not hospitable. They have a bad attitude and cranky

reviews.title: Heart of the Action
reviews.text:
Great staff, welcoming on checkin and all the way through.
They explain everything well, cleaners  are amazing.
Great room and a walk straight out into the action.
Hot water, heating/colling all work well.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Overall I believe I was ripped out for I paid to stay there. I wouldn’t book a stay here again.
reviews.positives: The property was location was great.
reviews.negatives: The property was overpriced when you factor in I had to be moved to another room because the first smelled like cigarettes; the advertisement a bar but the bar could not serve alcohol because the property had no liquor license; property was advertised as having 24/7 room service but it did not; the showers were not clean, had fixtures that were outdated and rusty; the shower door handles were falling off and the shower had shampoo, conditioner and body wash bottles for the guests to use but the body wash bottle was empty.

reviews.title: Great place and a great location.
reviews.text: Can’t be beat and don’t even expect the typical size room for NYC here. They are pretty much huge for anywhere. If you’re looking to have the NYC experience right outside your window…go for a room on the 7th Ave side. For a more muted experience, go with the Broadway side.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Overpriced hotel, cafe super expensive and poor quality. Spent $50 for 2 coffees, banana ,protein bar and danish past.
reviews.negatives: Old and tired, hand rails in elevator loose, rooms felt old and dated.

reviews.title: Top-rated hotel
reviews.text: It was great to be located right in front of Times Square. The room was spacious and clean, and it was nice to have a coffee machine as well. I recommend it.

reviews.title: The hotel i wouldn't recommend
reviews.negatives: I was not informed that the hotel was undergoing renovations at the time of booking. Had I known, I would have chosen alternative accommodations. The room did not match the photos advertised, and the cleaning staff failed to properly service the room during my stay. The hotel is overpriced.

reviews.title: Best location, spacious room.
reviews.text: The best advantage is that Times Square is just around the corner. Having breakfast while looking at Times Square through the large windows makes it feel like the best hotel. The room is spacious and in good cleaning condition. Highly recommended.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, City view, High floor

reviews.title: I do not recommend this hotel. I’ve stayed in cheaper hotels in New York that were far better.
reviews.negatives:
There were two lifts to take in order to reach the room, which was very uncomfortable.
We spent more than 2 hours without electricity in the room and I had to ask twice before it was fixed.
I never modified or split my bookings, but the staff insisted on taking two deposits for the same room because Booking made an error and divided the reservation in two parts. As a result, they even deactivated our room key in between, even though everything was already fully paid.

On the last day, things got even worse: we were woken up early in the morning and the staff insisted that we leave immediately because, according to them, our checkout was at 6 AM. In reality, our reservation was valid until 12 PM. They insisted and pressured us to get out of bed and pack, which completely ruined the end of our stay.

Too many mistakes, no apologies, despite the fact that we paid around $6,000. Overall, not a good experience.

reviews.title: Best Hotel Ever
reviews.text: We were amazed with this hotel it is the perfect location for time square. Right in the middle of everything. The staff are friendly and helpful and it’s clean and seriously if going to New York don’t go anywhere else

reviews.title: Bad

reviews.title: Short  Family Vacation
reviews.text: Very nice stay here. Staff is friendly and was very pleased with the area which was close to everything in Times Square. Prices was very well worth 2 rooms.
reviews.response: Thank you for discovering the Renaissance New York Times Square and for sharing your feedback!

reviews.title: Renaissance Time Square
reviews.positives: That we had a room when we arrived.
reviews.negatives: We did not know the hotel is under construction. We would have selected a different location had it been communicated. There is a water leak in our room we paid over 800 use a night for a room with a water leak. In hotel under renovations that did not have the 2 restraunts as advertised. We purchased yogurt from the hotel that had mold in it. This experience is one I will share Booking.com did not warn of conditions of hotel. False advertising is what was provided by Booking .com

reviews.title: Estadia optima
reviews.text: Local fantastico
reviews.response: Thank you for sharing your feedback!

reviews.title: We did not feel valued as a customer.
reviews.positives: The hotel was in walking distance of what we were going to in New York
reviews.negatives:
Service
We had a water leak the first night that allowed us to only have hot water.  They did not fix it and we were given a new room.  We were not moved until the next day.  So those of us who had traveled all day could not take a shower before going to bed.  We were promised that our first day would be compensated for and it was not.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Ménage de la chambre, à peine fait, certaines personnes du personnel ne sont pas agréable, le bar de l’hôtel ne fait pas d’expresso, hôtel, malin, insonorisé, même si nous étions au 20e étage, nous entendions beaucoup de bruit, de l’extérieur et des chambres à côté
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, City view, High floor

reviews.title: rude staff and not worthy the money.
reviews.positives: location is generally good. it's basically within the time square and there's a metro access next door.
reviews.negatives:
very noisy at night.
The payment includes many hidden charges that they will only inform you via a chat when you make the reservation. Be careful! 
The staff was very rude, and I felt discriminated against. They were not only poker faces but also verbally abusive. I asked the staff where I could book the bike rental, as it's included in my room rate. He laughed and said, " What? Not possible! Nothing is free." Very bad service. They just want you to pay and leave.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Emplacement fabuleux en plein cœur de times square. Personnel très aimable mais chambres très mal insonorisées et ne vaut pas un 5 étoiles parisien

reviews.title: The location was awesome the hotel itself was less than desirable.
reviews.negatives: Our room lacked cleanliness and comfort. I had to go to front desk more than 3 times to complain about the same issue when we checked in. Even after the director of housekeeping came to room there was still a problem.  The carpet was noticeably stained and lacked vacuuming. The glasses were filthy and although we would never use them it should have been corrected and never was til I took them to the front desk. The only place to relax after a long day in the city was an old worn down chair that was so uncomfortable it felt like sitting on the window ledge. I will not stay here again and I will not recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Super hotel
reviews.text: Top, emplacement idéal et une vue au bar restaurant de l’hotel magique .hotel propre avec un personnel agréable je le recommande
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Excelent
reviews.text: Very clean,outstanding service,great location.
